title: Discord Chat Link
description: Links your personal Minecraft client and discord channel with bi-directional communication.
body:
Discord Chat Link

This mod creates personal bi-directional communication between your Minecraft client and discord. Plus, it adds several handy discord commands.
![Demo image: Discord and Minecraft are perfectly linked on a multiplayer server.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e364adec0305eb03b897e3b4ab7d93c0957f0fff.png) ## Minecraft Commands: - /set-discord-bot-token -> Defines the token for your firt time using the mod. - /stop-discord-bot -> Stops the discord bot. - /start-discord-bot -> Starts the discord bot. ## Discord Commands: - /setchannel -> Selects the current discord channel as the default. - /health -> Displays your current player health. - /hunger -> Displays your current player hunger. - /quit -> Leaves the current world (singleplayer or multiplayer server). - /screenshot -> Takes and displays an in-game screenshot to discord. ## Set-Up
